title: podman(1): what's a "schema"?
body:
/kind documentation

**Description**

podman(1)'s description of the *--url* option describes the syntax of URLs using *schema* for the first portion, but doesn't elaborate on what values are recognized/supported other than "unix", which is used in an example.

comments.body: Care to open a PR to fix this.  I think adding examples of tcp and ssh would be useful.
